description: Equilibrium choice of n that maximizes profit under commitment.The formula for the curve is the total profit expression in (4), minus the one-time investment cost F(x).
Equilibrium paths of data sales, prices and profit, without commitment.
Data contract choices that maximize supplier revenue, without commitment. Lower discount rates mean that there is a stronger preference for early cash flows.
Word cloud of product descriptions on Datarade.Notes. This is a word cloud generated by the text of all the data descriptions on Datarade.

Do data sales or data subscriptions maximize welfare?Notes. Welfare is the sum of consumer surplus (18) or (19), data seller surplus (10) or (11) and goods producer surplus, which is zero. The fixed cost of setting up the subscription model η is set to 0.5.
